806.title: Bargain Hunt : Kedleston 18
806.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire, with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of friends take on each other to buy three items that they hope will make a profit at auction. They all have their sights on a golden gavel but only one team will achieve their goal.
